sys_script_include.description:
2.8 - 2022-03-09 - raj - STRY0114577 - Remove API Calls from Create My Task and Suggested Tasks 2.8 - message clean up for Activated and Installed for Localization
2.6.500 - 2.7 DFCT0010647 - "My Task" - Personal Task Email does NOT copy attachments into SharePoint Library using DocIntegrator
2.5 P3 STRY0080141 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) My Documents Tab and Shared DocumentsTab on the Task Form. STRY0080143 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Top Task Owner OR Assigned Member selects a UI to Enable OR Disable Shared Documents on the entire task tree. STRY0080193 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Documents - Disable Sharing UI - Warning Confirmation message Tasker Scrum Team. STRY0080195 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploading documents to the My Documents tab. STRY0080196 - UIFormatter - STRETCH - (PLATFORM) Task User uploads DocInt documents to the Shared Documents tab.
The Tasker application throughout checks - Is the Application wide ServiceNow Attachments on - Is shared attachments on for the Task - Is the Application wide DocInt Documents on - Is shared documents on for the Task - Is shared attachments on for the Process Template - Is shared attachments on for the Process Task Template This set of scripts was created to put all of these checks in one place
This script also handles all document and attachment copying
sys_script_include.name: taskerDocumentScripts
